name: frontend-architect-os
description: Frontend architecture, design-system, UI generation, accessibility, responsive review, PR review, and legacy UI migration workflows for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Generate, review, audit, and migrate frontend UI using design tokens, reusable components, accessibility rules, responsive design checks, and framework conventions.
defaultPrompt: Use Frontend Architect OS to analyze project context, infer the UI pattern, generate the implementation, and run a design review.
Use Frontend Architect OS to review current frontend changes for tokens, reuse, accessibility, responsive behavior, and documentation drift.
